goals.title: Persist design and implementation work order
goals.objective: Keep `.omx/plans/flucto-install-and-cli-update-design.md` and `.omx/plans/flucto-install-and-cli-update-work-order.md` as the implementation authorities.

goals.title: Implement shared binary setup service
goals.objective: Add Electron-free utility setup/check/provisioning support for yt-dlp and ffmpeg, preserving explicit/env/bin-dir overrides.

goals.title: Wire CLI setup and doctor guidance
goals.objective: Expose `flucto setup` and improve `flucto doctor` with actionable structured guidance while preserving JSON stdout semantics.

goals.title: Implement CLI GitHub update commands
goals.objective: Add update check/download/apply commands using GitHub releases, platform asset selection, and checksum verification when available.

goals.title: Add desktop startup binary repair
goals.objective: Attempt managed binary repair before the packaged desktop app quits on missing yt-dlp/ffmpeg, without replacing electron-updater.

goals.title: Harden release metadata and docs
goals.objective: Publish checksum metadata in release workflow/config and document setup/update commands in README.

goals.title: Run repeated tests and QA gate
goals.objective: Add focused tests, run npm test/lint/build and CLI smoke checks, perform cleanup and independent review until release-ready.

goals.title: Report, commit, and push
goals.objective: Write final report, commit intended files with Lore protocol, and push to origin/master.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json under .omx/ultragoal/brief.md constraints; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
